generic_instantiations.name: Acc
generic_instantiations.code:
package Acc is new Fold_Left_I_Acc

   Element_In  => Element_In,
   Array_Type  => Array_Type,
   Element_Out => Element_Out,
   Ind_Prop    => Ind_Prop,
   Final_Prop  => Final_Prop,
   F           => F);
